title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: mutter bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for mutter is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Mutter is a compositing window manager that displays and manages desktop through OpenGL. It combines the window-management logic inherited from the Metacity window manager with a display engine that uses the Clutter toolkit. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): observable input latency after upgrading to mutter-40.9.el9_6.1.x86_64 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117097)

full_text:
An update for mutter is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Mutter is a compositing window manager that displays and manages desktop through OpenGL. It combines the window-management logic inherited from the Metacity window manager with a display engine that uses the Clutter toolkit. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): observable input latency after upgrading to mutter-40.9.el9_6.1.x86_64 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117097)
